question: which industry has max no of employees
generated_sql: SELECT Industry AS industry_name, SUM("Number of employees") AS total_employees FROM organizations_100 GROUP BY Industry ORDER BY total_employees DESC LIMIT 1

question: give me the link of all indurty that were founded after 190 and does not belong to legal services
generated_sql: SELECT Website AS organization_website, Industry AS industry_name FROM organizations_100 WHERE Founded > 190 AND Industry != 'Legal Services'

question: give me the link of all indurty that were founded after 190 and does not belong to legal services or plastic and no of employess is > 2500
generated_sql: SELECT Website AS organization_website FROM organizations_100 WHERE Founded > 190 AND Industry NOT IN ('Legal Services', 'Plastics') AND "Number of employees" > 2500
